title: paul russells LED Batten Light 150cm, 50W 6000lm, 3000K/4000K/6500K Colour Changeable, 5ft LED Tube Lights for Kitchen Office Garage Home Lighting, Ceiling Fluorescent Strip Light Replacement, 1 Pack
features: 3-Year Replacement Guarantee & 24/7 Customer Support – Enjoy peace of mind with our comprehensive 3-year guarantee. Our dedicated support team is available 365 days a year to assist with any queries or issues.

Ultra-Bright & Energy-Efficient LED Batten Light – The Paul Russells 5FT LED Batten Tube Light delivers an impressive 6000 lumens brightness using only 50W, making it an eco-friendly, energy-saving solution. Comes with a 91cm Long cable for versatile installation.

Colour-Switchable Technology for Custom Ambiance – Easily adjust the colour temperature between Warm White (3000K), Cool White (4000K), and Daylight White (6500K) to create the perfect lighting atmosphere. Instant-on functionality with no flicker ensures smooth and comfortable illumination.

Premium Quality & Long-Lasting Design – CE/UKCA and RoHS certified for safety and reliability, this IP20-rated batten light is constructed from durable materials to provide long-lasting performance in any indoor environment.

Wide Applications for Every Space – Perfect for kitchens, living rooms, bedrooms, offices, garages, warehouses, hallways and commercial spaces. Boasting a CRI of 80+, these lights deliver vibrant, true-to-life colours with superior clarity. Upgrade your lighting with the versatile and durable Paul Russells LED Batten Tube Light – designed for efficiency, reliability and style.

specifications_table.Other Special Features of the Product: 3CCT Colour Changeable, 6000 Lumens, Easy Installation, Flicker Free, Non-Dimmable, Up To 85% Energy Savings
